title: armeria maritima subsp. duriaei
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. duriaei, also known as Sea Thrift or Thrift, is a subspecies of the Sea Thrift plant, a low-growing, evergreen perennial native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its rich content of saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Armeria maritima subsp. duriaei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, coughs, and colds.
